capture_blocks.objective: confirm that the path is stable before the optional quiet-window run
operator_instructions: Confirm that D01 has already been completed and saved.
Stay outside the controlled path between AP and ESP32-C5.
If the path looks unstable or the background is not honestly quieter, stop and do not claim L0.
capture_blocks.scenario: short technical warm-up before the quiet-control attempt

capture_blocks.objective: capture a stronger empty control segment under the quietest background that can be honestly defended
operator_instructions: Leave the controlled 2.00 m path between AP and ESP32-C5.
If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.
Keep the room layout unchanged and minimize nearby human activity.
capture_blocks.scenario: longer empty baseline under the quietest honestly available condition

capture_blocks.objective: capture one static-presence segment under the same quiet-control condition
operator_instructions: Enter the midpoint of the controlled path between AP and ESP32-C5.
Stand almost still with a natural posture.
Do not touch the chair, AP, table, or cables.
capture_blocks.scenario: static presence under the same quiet-control attempt

capture_blocks.objective: capture one slow-motion segment under the same quiet-control condition
operator_instructions: Stay within the same controlled path between AP and ESP32-C5.
Move slowly back and forth without leaving the corridor.
Do not change the topology of the stand.
capture_blocks.scenario: slow motion under the same quiet-control attempt

capture_blocks.objective: finish the run with a second long empty reference under the same quiet-control condition
operator_instructions: Leave the controlled path one final time.
If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.
Keep the room layout unchanged until the capture is stopped.
capture_blocks.scenario: final empty recovery under the same quiet-control attempt

config.description: D02 honest quiet-control candidate on the current single-link stand.
operator_notes: Honest quiet-control candidate captured on the same physical stand as D01.
Run this only if D01 already produced a usable repeatability package.
Keep the primary prplOS-compatible dual-band AP node on 5 GHz / channel 36 / 20 MHz.
Do not claim L0 if the room and network background are not independently quieter than ordinary L1.

honesty_notes: This runtime surface does not prove L0 automatically.
Disabling Wi-Fi on the control laptop alone is not sufficient evidence for L0.

scripts.description: Check local WSL/Linux dependencies and capture-device visibility.
Apply the requested router radio, SSID, and AccessPoint settings.
Collect router-side snapshots over SSH or serial console.
Build the configured ESP32 firmware workspace.
Flash the configured ESP32 firmware workspace.
Capture the ESP32 serial stream for the configured duration.
Run a continuous serial capture and pause for operator confirmation between configured capture blocks.
Run preflight, AP setup, AP snapshot, and then the interactive operator-guided capture sequence.
